framework.name: Mastercard frames trust as THE product, not speed or cost
framework.description: Mastercard is positioning trust/verification as the core value proposition of agent payments — not faster transactions or lower fees. This implies they see the moat in being the trust layer, not the rails. 'Trust becomes the product.'
framework.raw_quote: This is a new payments paradigm. And in this paradigm, trust becomes the product.

source.title: How Verifiable Intent builds trust in agentic AI commerce - Mastercard
